title: Chart settings wizard to allow customized sort and display legend on the relevant part of the chart
excerpt: Please can you enhance the charts wizard to allow the user to sort the legend themselves, bespoke? Currently it is ascending or descending only. Also, can you enhance the charts wizard to allow the user to remove the leg…

posts.author: Emanuel.Melo (Emanuel Melo)
posts.cookedHtml: Please can you enhance the charts wizard to allow the user to sort the legend themselves, bespoke? Currently it is ascending or descending only. Also, can you enhance the charts wizard to allow the user to remove the legend from the side bar and instead display the legend on the relevant part of the chart. An example of this would be in the pie and donut charts. Thanks!
